title: sambucus nigra f. rotundifolia
intro: Sambucus nigra f. rotundifolia, also known as the round-leaved elder or elderberry, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia, belonging to the family Adoxaceae. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sambucus nigra f. rotundifolia include relief from cold and flu symptoms, reduced inflammation, and improved immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory issues. Elderberry preparations, such as tinctures, teas, and syrups, can be found in health food stores and online, and are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of illness.
